globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.cdnfonts.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.cdnfonts.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https://tryhackme.com https://www.tryhackme.com; frame-src 'self' https://tryhackme.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
